description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a metallic blue back panel and a prominent triple-lens camera array housed in a raised square module at the top left. The back also displays a centered, reflective Apple logo, indicating it is an iPhone model. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible seams for buttons and antenna lines, but no buttons are clearly visible in these views. The device is thin, with a slight protrusion for the rear camera module. The overall finish is glossy and smooth, giving it a premium and high-tech appearance.
description: A sleek, metallic blue iPhone with a triple-lens rear camera, glossy finish, and edge-to-edge display with a top notch.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the metallic blue back, triple-lens camera array in the top left, and centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the device's thinness and the slight camera bump, with no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screen with a blue abstract wallpaper and a top notch.
description_view_3: Right side profile highlighting the slim form factor and camera bump, with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A reflective silver Apple logo is centered on the back panel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue abstract wallpaper with intersecting light beams and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses are arranged in a triangular layout within a raised square module at the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash and sensor.
attribute_button_layout: None visible in the provided views.
